title: Playmates.
content:
God permits industrious angels
    Afternoons to play.
    I met one, -- forgot my school-mates,
    All, for him, straightway.

    God calls home the angels promptly
    At the setting sun;
    I missed mine. How dreary marbles,
    After playing Crown!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Playmates."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
